---
title: "Captain James Dundas V.C."
---

## Captain James Dundas V.C.

**Dates:** (1842–1879)

### Description

nephew of Anne Mackenzie.

### Biography

[ODNB] James, Colin and George Dundas also had two younger brothers, William John Dundas (1849-1921) and David Dundas (1854-1922).

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
